content.text:
# Top 5 AI Tools for Developers in 2026

## Introduction
Welcome to another episode where we break down the most powerful AI tools reshaping how developers write code.

## Section 1: Claude Code
First up is Claude Code by Anthropic. This terminal-native AI assistant can read your entire codebase, write tests, and even deploy your apps.

## Section 2: GitHub Copilot
GitHub Copilot continues to be the go-to for inline code suggestions. With its latest update, it now supports multi-file edits.

## Section 3: Cursor
Cursor takes the VS Code experience and supercharges it with AI. Its composer feature can refactor entire projects.

## Section 4: Bolt
Bolt lets you describe an app in plain English and generates a full-stack application. Perfect for rapid prototyping.

## Section 5: Devin
Devin is the closest thing we have to an autonomous software engineer. It can handle complex multi-step tasks independently.

## Conclusion
These tools are not replacing developers — they're making us 10x more productive. Subscribe for more AI tool breakdowns!
